rules.title: Storage account without encryption
rules.description: Storage account is not using customer-managed encryption keys

rules.title: Storage account allows public blob access
rules.description: Storage account allows public access to blobs

rules.title: Storage account without HTTPS enforcement
rules.description: Storage account does not enforce HTTPS-only traffic

rules.title: Storage account without network rules
rules.description: Storage account allows access from all networks
rules.remediation: Add network_rules block with default_action = Deny

rules.title: NSG allows unrestricted SSH
rules.description: Network security group allows SSH (port 22) from any source
rules.remediation: Restrict SSH access to specific IP ranges

rules.title: NSG allows unrestricted RDP
rules.description: Network security group allows RDP (port 3389) from any source
rules.remediation: Restrict RDP access to specific IP ranges

rules.title: SQL Server without auditing
rules.description: Azure SQL Server does not have auditing enabled

rules.title: SQL Database without TDE
rules.description: Azure SQL Database does not have Transparent Data Encryption enabled
rules.remediation: Ensure transparent_data_encryption_enabled = true (default in newer provider versions)

rules.title: SQL Server publicly accessible
rules.description: Azure SQL Server allows public network access
rules.remediation: Set public_network_access_enabled = false and use private endpoints

rules.title: Key Vault without purge protection
rules.description: Key Vault does not have purge protection enabled

rules.title: Key Vault without soft delete
rules.description: Key Vault does not have soft delete enabled

rules.title: AKS cluster without RBAC
rules.description: AKS cluster does not have Azure RBAC enabled

rules.title: AKS cluster without network policy
rules.description: AKS cluster does not have network policy configured
rules.remediation: Add network_profile block with network_policy = azure or calico

rules.title: AKS API server publicly accessible
rules.description: AKS cluster API server is publicly accessible

rules.title: VM without disk encryption
rules.description: Virtual machine disk is not encrypted

rules.title: VNet without DDoS protection
rules.description: Virtual network does not have DDoS protection enabled

rules.title: NSG without flow logs
rules.description: Network security group does not have flow logs enabled

rules.title: App Service without HTTPS enforcement
rules.description: App Service does not enforce HTTPS-only connections

rules.title: App Service with FTP enabled
rules.description: App Service has FTP deployment enabled

rules.title: Hardcoded Azure credentials
rules.description: Azure credentials are hardcoded in the configuration
rules.remediation: Use managed identity, environment variables, or Key Vault

rules.title: Cosmos DB without encryption
rules.description: Cosmos DB account is not using customer-managed keys

rules.title: Function App without HTTPS enforcement
rules.description: Function App does not enforce HTTPS-only connections
